greetings.0: Horas! Songon dia do ahu boi mangurupi hamu sadarion?
greetings.1: Horas! Horas ro! What can I do for you?
greetings.2: Ale nadisan! So glad to talk to you!
greetings.3: Horas! Au dison laho mangurupi. Aha do na porlu di hamu?
greetings.4: Ale! Nungga songondia? How can I be useful?
